'''gotafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:utopian|utopian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:utopian|utopian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gotafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || gotafithi || gotafiji || gotafishi || gotafiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || gotafuthu || gotafuju || gotafushu || gotafuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || gotafuthu || gotafuju || gotafushu || gotafuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || gotafufthuf || gotafufjuf || gotafufshuf || gotafufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || gotafethe || gotafeje || gotafeshe || gotafeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || gotafotho || gotafojo || gotafosho || gotafoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || gotafotho || gotafojo || gotafosho || gotafoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || gotafofthof || gotafofjof || gotafofshof || gotafofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gotafïfthïf || gotafïfjïf || gotafïfshïf || gotafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gotafïfthïf || gotafïfjïf || gotafïfshïf || gotafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gotafïfthïf || gotafïfjïf || gotafïfshïf || gotafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gotafïfthïf || gotafïfjïf || gotafïfshïf || gotafïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || gotafæthæ || gotafæjæ || gotafæshæ || gotafækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || gotafatha || gotafaja || gotafasha || gotafaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || gotafatha || gotafaja || gotafasha || gotafaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || gotafafthaf || gotafafjaf || gotafafshaf || gotafafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || gotafasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || gotafshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || gotafroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || gotafmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || gotafyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogotafnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogotafnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogotafnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogotafnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || gotatafasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || gotatafshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || gotatafroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || gotatafmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || gotatafyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogotatafnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogotatafnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogotatafnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogotatafnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || getæfasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || getæfshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || getæfroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || getæfmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || getæfyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogetæfnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogetæfnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogetæfnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogetæfnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || gotfafasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || gotfafshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || gotfafroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || gotfafmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || gotfafyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogotfafnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogotfafnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogotfafnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogotfafnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
